description: Generate and optimize a 5-email cold outreach sequence for an AI automation agency targeting home services companies

eval_criteria.reply_likelihood: Would a busy contractor actually respond?
eval_criteria.personalization: Does it feel custom, not templated?
eval_criteria.value_first: Does it lead with value before asking?
eval_criteria.sequence_flow: Does each email build on the last naturally?

mutation_strategy: analyze weakest criteria, make targeted improvements
